VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on bioRxiv (DOI: 10.1101/2025.01.05.630192) with the exact title and authors matching the citation, including Xibin Zhou as the first author. The automated checker's "mismatch" with "Jawdat Sandakly" appears to be an error; the real first author is confirmed as Xibin Zhou across multiple sources.
LINK: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.01.05.630192v2
